title: 6-DOF Robot Arm
description: A 6 degree-of-freedom robotic arm powered by an ESP32 microcontroller and a PWM servo driver. The arm has 6 servos giving it full rotational freedom across every joint, allowing precise positioning and object manipulation. Control is handled wirelessly via a game controller — inputs are read by the ESP32 over Bluetooth and translated into servo angles in real time. The whole thing is written in C++, with custom code managing PWM signals, controller mapping, and smooth movement interpolation.
